phase_notes.plan: Implement M3-000 only: strict model catalog loader, pinned-revision cache service, per-model file lock, offline miss error, hash mismatch quarantine, and focused tests. Do not touch training wrappers or DB schema.

phase_notes.build: Implemented shared strict model catalog dataclasses/validator, worker model cache service with default pinned HTTP downloader, file locking, offline miss, hash verification/quarantine, and focused tests.
phase_notes.check: Required M3-000 verification commands passed: task JSON, py_compile, focused pytest, strict model catalog verification, import boundary, and diff whitespace checks.
phase_notes.done: M3-000 implementation was verified and committed at c683a2b; closeout updates are ready to commit and push.
